scripts.type-check: pnpm run type-check:tsc && pnpm run type-check:basedpyright
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:biome && pnpm run lint:ruff && pnpm run lint:clang
scripts.lint:ruff: uv run --group dev ruff check && uv run --group dev ruff format --check
scripts.lint:clang: find src \( -name '*.c' -o -name '*.h' \) ! -name 'embedded_web_data.h' | xargs uv run --group dev clang-format --dry-run --Werror
scripts.format: pnpm run format:biome && pnpm run format:ruff && pnpm run format:clang
scripts.format:ruff: uv run --group dev ruff check --fix && uv run --group dev ruff format
scripts.format:clang: find src \( -name '*.c' -o -name '*.h' \) ! -name 'embedded_web_data.h' | xargs uv run --group dev clang-format -i
scripts.web-ui:build: vite build web-ui && node scripts/embed-dist.js web-ui/dist src/embedded_web_data.h
scripts.web-ui:build:debug: vite build web-ui --mode=development && node scripts/embed-dist.js web-ui/dist src/embedded_web_data.h
